violations.description: Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. -Pre-cooked beef tri-tip packages sitting out to thaw. -Need to thaw under refrigeration or under cold running water.
General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. -Rusty shelves in walk in cooler need replaced.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean shelving in walk in cooler.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean fan covers in walk in cooler.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. -Need for chlorine dishwasher and buckets.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Dishwasher is not emitting detergent.--Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Dishwasher not emitting sanitizer.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors in kitchen need cleaned and painted.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Method, temperature and time (5 pts deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
Clean, proper temperature, cleaning agent (2 pts deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
